title: Xyza's Ice Mod
description: Adds a ton of fun Ice-themed content and a new Ice Caves dimension!
body:
# Xyza's Ice Mod
## Information
Xyza's Ice Mod is a mod that adds a ton of fun and cool ice related stuff to Minecraft. I don't know if you ever wanted an ice related mod but this mod is fun both ways. Explore through the new Ice Caves Dimension and encounted obstacles, foes, and c... c... ccccoldd... This mod was made using Mcreator.
Also there is some Nintendo content which, to be clear, is not mine by any standards and are fully owned by Nintendo, I just put it in for fun :).
## Requirements
**Requires Geckolib [https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)**
## Details
### Ice caves
A new and Challenging Ice caves dimension is added by this mod, where many new mobs live and structures generate. In order to enter, you need to construct a **Blue Ice Portal** and light it using a **Powdered Snow Bucket**. Also water freezes you in the Ice Caves dimension.
### Mobs
Many new mobs are added that live in the Ice Caves. The Yeti live in ice forests and drop yeti fur and yeti teeth. Chilleds are a new zombie variant that spawns and effects you with **Frozen** on contact. Ice cubes are a slime variant that are hard to fight due to their resistance to knockback. The Freeze is a mob that spawns in Ice Fortresses that drop Freeze rods.
### Structures
Three structures are added by this mod. **Ruined Ice Portals** generate both in the Overworld and in the Ice Caves, and are basically just the ice counterpart of the Ruined Portal. **Ice Fortresses** appear in the Ice Caves, and contain a parkour challenge, fairly good loot , and hostile mobs. **Ice Castles** are huge, grand castles which contain a boss fight and good loot.
### Fossilite
A new material which is stronger than Netherite appears in this mod, only in the Ice Caves. At first you need to find it in loot chests so you can craft an Ice Pick, then you can mine the ore & smelt it, then after that just a Fossilite pickaxe will do the trick.
### Items
A variety of new items can be obtained in this mod. Ice Picks can be crafted using fossilite, yeti fur, and yeti teeth and mines ice a ton faster. Fur coats can be crafted using wool, yeti fur, and Fossilite to keep you from freezing. An **Ice Staff** can be crafted from a combination of Icicles, Freeze Rods, Fossilite, Hyperfreeze, and Blue Ice and has various uses for you to find out.
### Blocks
A few new blocks are added. Jump boosters can bounce you up high when you jump off them. Hyperfreeze freezes you while you're stepping on it. There are Ice bricks (with a blue variant) which can be crafted. A new wood type is added as well.
### Music discs
You can find 2 music discs in this mod, one from the Ruined Ice Portals and another in the Ice Castle. The Ice Castle has a jukebox in it as well. These are both music from Mario games because they actually be fire.

### Boss

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
The Frostbite spawns when you summon him by right-clicking the emerald in the center of the Ice Castle. His attacks all involve freezing, making that his main strength. He has an Ice Emerald that he wears that grant him these powers. If you kill him, he drops the Ice Emerald, which heals you and all of your items when you use it (though there is a lengthy cooldown.)
</details>

## Plans
I have no plans for now to continue work on this mod, but maybe I'll buff or debuff some items sometime.
